label: Monster_Encounter
description: A monstrous creature climbs aboard the ship's deck.

label: Tribute Demand
description: A speaker claims these waters belong to the Scaled Queen and asserts their right to collect tribute

label: Dialogue_with_Kobolds
description: Kobolds barrage the travelers with questions upon learning their identity

label: Ship Crash Discovery
description: Rix witnesses a ship crashing on the northern rocks

label: Tattoo Symbol Recognition
description: Character identifies the gold hangman's noose tattoo as a symbol of the Gilded Gallows thieves' guild.

label: Blocked Mushroom Harvest
description: Tarak's attempt to gather heart cap mushrooms from myconids is thwarted by a fungal octopus guardian.

label: discovery_of_plaza
description: The path widens into a long plaza with six open doorways carved into the cliff wall

label: discovery_of_statue
description: A massive stone statue of a dragon overlooks the plaza

label: Description
description: Text describes monastic cells layout and furnishings

label: None
description: Text contains no actionable events.

label: Zombie Encounter
description: Adventurers fight three zombies threatening Blepp and Tarak

label: Dialogue with Runara
description: Runara reveals the wrecked ship as the zombie source

label: Investigation Quest
description: Characters tasked to investigate the wrecked ship

label: Wreck Investigation Prompt
description: Varnoth and the kobold Rix report a recent shipwreck, hinting at supernatural causes.

label: Dialogue About Dream
description: Runara discusses the cleric's dream and suggests zombies relate to the hunger of death

label: Destiny Discussion Upon Arrival
description: Character discusses destiny with Runara upon arrival

label: Destiny Reflection After Quests
description: Runara prompts character to consider heroic actions shaping destiny

label: Final Encouragement
description: Runara assures character destiny will become clearer

label: Initial Encounter
description: Paladin arrives in Dragon's Rest and meets Runara.

label: Guidance from Elders
description: Runara directs the paladin to consult Tarak and Varnoth about overcoming corruption.

label: Temple Reflection
description: Paladin spends time meditating in the temple of Bahamut.

label: Final Counsel
description: Runara questions the paladin about lessons learned against corruption.

label: Dialogue About Past Betrayal
description: Tarak recounts his betrayal of the guild and tragic love affair, advising the rogue to abandon crime.

label: Guardian Attack
description: Three Fume Drakes emerge from the hot spring waters to attack intruders attempting to collect mushrooms or access the spring.

label: Magical_Regeneration_Benefit
description: Bathing in the spring grants temporary hit point recovery through Hit Dice rolls

label: Level Adjustment Notice
description: Text notes level-based difficulty adjustments for gameplay progression

label: Blight_Spread_Discovery
description: A blight originating from the tomb of Sharruth has poisoned the myconid colonies, killing their leader Sinensa.

label: Vent_Blockade_Event
description: Blocked vents near Seagrow Caves caused toxic fumes from Sharruth's tomb to spill into the myconid caves.

label: Stirge_Encounter
description: Blood-sucking stirges nest in the caves, posing a danger to intruders despite avoiding the fungus-eating myconids.

label: Travel Options
description: Characters select between boating or hiking routes to reach Seagrow Caves

label: Tide_Cycle_Description
description: Text details tidal patterns affecting access to the caves

label: Guardian Encounter
description: A spore servant octopus ambushes intruders in the entrance tunnel.

label: Stirge_Join_Battle
description: Two stirge cling to the tunnel ceiling and join the战斗 if fighting breaks out in this area.

label: Discovery
description: A sentient mushroom emerges from the ground with pulsating tendrils

label: Fungal Ambush
description: Three violet fungi ambush the party, with two remaining stationary until provoked

label: Environmental Hazard
description: Characters discover the deceptive appearance of non-threatening purple fungi

label: Encountering Stirges
description: Two stirges are added to the encounter for 2nd-level characters.

label: Fire_Snake_Egg_Discovery
description: Adventurers discover 25 obsidian fragments worth 10 gp each from a shattered fire snake egg

label: Sinensa Grants Permission
description: Sinensa awards the party with the ruby morel and permits retention of other loot

label: Elixir Creation
description: Tarak reveals method to craft elixir of health using ruby morel

label: Zombie_Encounters_in_Wrecks
description: Characters exploring other wrecks discover additional zombies animated by the talisman in Compass Rose's hold.

label: Giant_Octopus_Encounter
description: Giant octopuses ambush explorers in submerged wreckage.

label: Ghoul_Danger_Aboard
description: Unusual dangers like ghouls lurk within other shipwrecks.

label: Description_of_Wreck_Structure
description: Text describes structural features of the shipwreck including walls, ceilings, doors, and lighting conditions.

label: Exploration
description: Adventurers observe a derelict ship wedged against rock formations and massive dragon bones

label: Exploration
description: Adventurers explore the main deck of the shipwreck, noting environmental details and discovering potential access points below.

label: Treasure_Discovery
description: Characters discover valuable loot in the crow's nest including jewelry and gems

label: Broken Ballista
description: The ballista is found to be nonfunctional

label: Observation
description: Small, harmless crabs crawl over skeletal remains, creating an illusion of movement

label: Suspicious_Movement
description: The skeleton appears to move unexpectedly

label: Floorboard Trap Activation
description: Triggering the floorboard releases a dart trap with an attack bonus of +5, dealing 2 (1d4) piercing damage and requiring a 11 Constitution saving throw against poison damage.

label: Environmental Guidance
description: Text references climbing/swimming mechanics and breathable surfaces in the submerged hold

label: Exploration
description: Characters plan to explore the Clifftop Observatory via various routes

label: Winged Shape Observed
description: Adventurers spot a winged, glittering blue shape swooping overhead after hearing a screeching roar

label: Exploration
description: Characters explore cliffs leading to area D1

label: Exploration
description: Characters explore platforms atop pillars (D2-D5)

label: ConsiderApproachOptions
description: Evaluating methods to ascend cliffs or climb to ruins

label: SpotDragonWyrmling
description: A glowing blue dragon wyrmling is spotted resting on a distant column

label: Bridge Activation
description: Using the moonstone key activates an energy bridge across the gap

label: Exploration Challenge
description: Characters seek creative solutions to access the isolated study

label: Dragon Encounter Choice
description: Players must choose between battling Sparkrender or navigating to the secret library

label: Potential Rescue Mission
description: Option to free the imprisoned Bronze Dragon Wyrmling

label: Presence of Blue Dragon
description: A blue dragon wyrmling is found sleeping in the northeast corner of the tower

label: Avoid Awakening Dragon
description: Characters attempt silent movement to bypass dragon detection

label: Statue Interaction Challenge
description: Statues require stealth checks to prevent waking Sparkrender

label: Freeing Aidron
description: Aidron is bound by chains requiring three clasps to be removed, reducing his movement after liberation.

label: Creature Listing
description: Adventure features these creatures in its lore
